policy: Core = compounding sleeve (thesis-death exit only). Satellite = tactical recycling with higher harvest threshold to beat tax drag.

rules.core_note: Add only on ≥5% dip from last add or fresh 30d high, liquidity vector allows, thesis INTACT, OPS ≤ core_max_ops.
rules.satellite_note: Harvest at ≥35% gross preferred (DE Abgeltung ~25% makes 20% net thin). At 20–34% only if recycling into strictly better OPS+GEM setup same week.
rules.liquidity_vector: Satellite trims/fills require vector state ≤4 or 6 per Vector Liquidity Engine v2 — never fight DEPLOY+EXPanding with cash raises unless taking profit.
